# Doom Debate Profile Index

All profiles share a common schema (see [`_template.qmd`](_template.qmd)).

---

## Profiles by Archetype

| Profile | Archetype | p(doom) | Failure Mechanism | Epist. Stance |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [Yudkowsky](yudkowsky.qmd) | Hard Doomer | >95% (extinction) | Single unipolar optimizer | Prior-dominant |
| [Soares](soares.qmd) | Hard Doomer (formal) | >90% | Single optimizer / inner alignment | Prior-dominant |
| [Bostrom](bostrom.qmd) | Structural Doomer (canonical, evolved) | ~10–40%? (shifted) | Single optimizer → DSA (historical) | Prior-dominant → empirical |
| [Hinton](hinton.qmd) | Structural Doomer (late-onset) | ~10–20% (extinction) | Gradual capability → goal divergence | Empirical-conditioned |
| [Ord](ord.qmd) | GCR Framer (between Structural & Conditional) | ~10% (existential, century) | Portfolio across mechanisms | Empirical / decomposition |
| [Christiano](christiano.qmd) | Conditional Doomer / AI Control Optimist | 10–20% catast.; ~46% aggregate bad | Gradual oversight erosion | Empirical-conditioned |
| [Amodei](amodei.qmd) | Conditional Doomer / Build Carefully | 10–25% | Misuse (near); gradual erosion (long) | Empirical + architectural |
| [Critch](critch.qmd) | Multipolar / Governance Realist | 85% (mostly industrial dehumanization) | Multipolar / structural erosion | Political-economy |
| [Grace](grace.qmd) | Epistemic Hygienist / Gradualist | Not stated; tracks expert median 5%, mean 16% | No commitment | Decomposition-first |
| [Bengio](bengio.qmd) | Safe-by-Design Alarmist | High (signed extinction statement) | Agency-enabled (any route) | Architecturally-conditioned |
| [LeCun](lecun.qmd) | Paradigm Skeptic / Capability Skeptic | ~0% for AI-autonomy doom | None accepted (power concentration only) | Empirical-conditioned |

---

## Key Crux Comparison

| Profile | A: Agency emergent? | C: Current LLMs as evidence? | D: Tractable? | E: Warning shots? | F: Extinction focus? |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Yudkowsky | Yes — emergent | Near-zero | No | No | Yes |
| Soares | Yes — optimization pressure | Near-zero | No | Uncertain (deception) | Yes |
| Bostrom (historical) | Yes | Weak | Hard | Uncertain | Yes |
| Hinton | Probably | Moderate | Uncertain | Uncertain | Yes |
| Ord | Uncertain | Weak-moderate | Uncertain | Possible | Yes (strict def.) |
| Christiano | Partial | Weak-moderate | Yes | Yes | Both |
| Amodei | Both | Strong | Yes | Ongoing | Both |
| Critch | Mixed | Moderate | Not primary bottleneck | Ongoing (slow) | Both |
| Grace | Open | Moderate | Open | Probably | Tracks both |
| Bengio | Design choice | Moderate-high | Via design | Early signs | Both |
| LeCun | No (current paradigm) | Strong (against doom) | Irrelevant | Inherent limits | No |

---

## Thinkers Not Profiled (yet)

- **Helen Toner** — governance/strategic lens; CSET, OpenAI board; adjacent to Critch
- **Stuart Russell** — corrigibility and human-compatible AI; distinct technical approach
- **Kate Crawford / Timnit Gebru** — present-harms / power-critique cluster
- **Sam Altman** — nominal high concern + builds anyway; OpenAI "responsible scaling" framing
- **Evan Hubinger** — deceptive alignment / goal misgeneralization; technically adjacent to Soares
